name: Chocolate Banana Split Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light or dark corn syrup
2 tbsp Light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9 inch baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, stir together flour, cocoa, cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a medium bowl, whisk together sugar and water until dissolved.
5. Add egg whites and corn syrup to the sugar mixture; beat until blended.
6. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring with a whisk until smooth.
7. Stir in the mashed bananas.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack.
11. Cut the cake into 12 squares, then slice each square horizontally to create four pieces.
12. Place a banana slice between each layer of cake.
13. Drizzle each piece with about one tablespoon of chocolate sauce.
14. Garnish with whipped topping and cherries, if desired.
Makes 12 servings.
